# Call Dr. Gene Boyle — Irvine to Las Vegas Relocation

> Real estate relocation service for people moving from Irvine, California to
> Las Vegas, Nevada. Dr. Gene Boyle (California DRE #02282581) plans the move
> from Irvine; Dr. Jan Duffy (Nevada REALTOR® #S.0197614, Berkshire Hathaway
> HomeServices Nevada Properties) handles Las Vegas tours, contracts, and closing.

## Core pages
- [Home](https://www.calldrboyle.com/): Irvine-to-Las-Vegas relocation overview.
- [Relocation overview](https://www.calldrboyle.com/relocation): How the relocation service works.
- [How it works](https://www.calldrboyle.com/how-it-works): Step-by-step relocation process.
- [Irvine to Las Vegas](https://www.calldrboyle.com/irvine-to-las-vegas): Why and how Californians move to Las Vegas.
- [Moving guide](https://www.calldrboyle.com/guides/moving-from-irvine-to-las-vegas): Detailed Irvine-to-Vegas moving guide.
- [Our team](https://www.calldrboyle.com/team): Dr. Gene Boyle and Dr. Jan Duffy.
- [Contact](https://www.calldrboyle.com/contact): Schedule a relocation call.

## Buyers
- [California relocators](https://www.calldrboyle.com/buyers/california-relocator): For buyers moving from California.
- [Second homes](https://www.calldrboyle.com/buyers/second-home-las-vegas): Las Vegas second-home purchases.
- [First-time buyers](https://www.calldrboyle.com/buyers/first-time-buyers): First-time buyer guidance.
- [Luxury homes](https://www.calldrboyle.com/buyers/luxury-homes-las-vegas): Luxury Las Vegas homes.

- [Neighborhoods](https://www.calldrboyle.com/neighborhoods): Las Vegas and Henderson areas.
- [55+ communities](https://www.calldrboyle.com/55-plus-communities): Active-adult communities.

- [Market report](https://www.calldrboyle.com/market-report): Current Las Vegas market data.

## Contact
- Service area: Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, Nevada; relocation origin Irvine, California.
- California office: 320 Junco, Irvine, CA 92618 (Dr. Gene Boyle).
- Email: Hello@CallDrBoyle.com (general), Gene@CallDrBoyle.com (California), Relocation@CallDrBoyle.com (relocation planning).
- Brokerage: Berkshire Hathaway HomeServices Nevada Properties (Dr. Jan Duffy).
